data.content: Completed the implementation step for acceptance as a first-class knot field by advancing every child knot one authorized workflow step. Approved 28b1 after validating core acceptance tests on /Users/cartine/knots-2412-acceptance-field with make sanity passing at 95.23% coverage and foolery backend coverage in ../foolery. Shipped the knots-side children on main commit 3fc70a7b0542 with local make sanity at 95.24% coverage plus green remote CI, Repo Hygiene, Release, and Changesets Version PR runs. Shipped the foolery-side children on main commit 3afbd2f70345 after syncing remote main, rerunning the merged backend suite, and confirming green remote CI and Coverage Badge runs.
